title: Winkelhuurprijzen Amsterdam 2025
summary: Voor u ligt de onderzoeksrapportage “Winkelhuren Amsterdam medio 2025”. title: Dubbele kloof zorgt voor extra druk op logistiek vastgoed
summary: De invoering van de zero-emissie zones zal de druk op logistiek Nederland alleen maar doen toenemen. Dit vraagt om meer samenwerking om goederenstromen naar de stad te bundelen.

title: The Feminist City
summary: In onze serie 'Feminist City' belichtten we verschillende perspectieven van vrouwen in steden en hoe stedelijke planning, stedelijk bestuur en kantoorinrichting vrouwen beter kunnen ondersteunen in hun dagelijks leven.

title: Overzicht Value of a City Insights
summary: In de serie 'Value of a City' geven wij maandelijks onze visie op een onderwerp dat te maken heeft met de waarde van de stad. Deze visie komt tot stand vanuit intern onderzoek en dialoog met interne en externe stakeholders, in nauwe samenwerking met consultants en analisten uit ons Real Estate Strategy & Innovation team.

title: CEE MarketBeats
summary: Cushman & Wakefield MarketBeat reports analyse quarterly commercial real estate activity in the CEE region (Czech Republic, Hungary, Poland, Romania, and Slovakia) across office, retail, industrial and hospitality real estate sectors.

title: CEE Retail MarketBeat Reports
summary: Access the latest quarterly commercial real estate results for Central Eastern Europe's (CEE) retail sector. MarketBeat reports analyse quarterly market activity including, supply, demand and pricing trends.

title: CEE Industrial MarketBeat Reports
summary: Access the latest quarterly commercial real estate results for Central Eastern Europe's (CEE) industrial sector. MarketBeat reports analyse quarterly market activity including, supply, demand and pricing trends.

title: Czech Republic MarketBeats
summary: MarketBeat reports analyse quarterly Czech Republic commercial property activity across office, retail, industrial and hotel real estate sectors including supply, demand and pricing trends at the market and submarket levels.

title: Belgium Retail MarketBeat
summary: Retail MarketBeat is a brief summary of the retail sector in key cities across Belgium, providing comment on recent trends as well as market data and analysis.

title: Belgium Industrial MarketBeat
summary: Industrial MarketBeat is a summary of the Belgium industrial and logistics property sector, providing comment on recent trends as well as market data and analysis.

title: Belgium Regional Office MarketBeat
summary: Office MarketBeat is a brief summary of the office sector in key cities across Belgium, providing comment on recent trends as well as market data and analysis.

title: Brussels Office MarketBeat
summary: Office Marketbeat is a summary of the Brussels office property sector providing comment on recent trends as well as market data and analysis.

title: Hospitality Sweden
summary: Get the latest insights on Swedish hospitality market, including key trends, performance drivers, and investment activity.

title: Focus on Warsaw East - Praga
summary: Today, Praga is experiencing one of the most dynamic transformations in Warsaw. Its distinctive historic identity is seamlessly combined with modern infrastructure and a high standard of urban space.

title: Health of the Market – Elderly Care and Seniors
